center.name: 胡胡伊省
center.summary: 胡胡伊省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括安地斯銀鴨、金领金刚鹦鹉、Mottle-cheeked tyrannulet等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliosa: Andes of northwestern Argentina between the provinces of Jujuy and Catamarca Azara's spinetail inhabits a variety of semi-open landscapes both humid and drier, including the edges of montane evergreen forest, secondary forest, the edges of cloudforest and elfin forest, bushy pastures and roadsides, riparian thickets, and in Argentina semi-deciduous and deciduous woodlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: casaresi, Andean foothills in northwestern Argentina's Jujuy, Salta, and Tucumán provinces The black-banded woodcreeper inhabits a very wide variety of forested landscapes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: paranensis is found in the Andes of northwestern Argentina from Jujuy and Salta provinces south to Mendoza and the sierras de Cordoba

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes from Peru's Department of Lima south into Chile's Tarapacá Region and through western Bolivia into far northwestern Argentina's Jujuy Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: argentinus is found in Argentina between Jujuy and Catamarca provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: argentina is found in southern Bolivia's Santa Cruz, Chuquisaca and Tarija departments, in northwestern Argentina's Jujuy, Salta, and Tucumán provinces, and in western Paraguay's Boquerón and Presidente Hayes departments. The giant antshrike inhabits landscapes that vary geographically, though in all it favors the understorey to mid-storey

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: continoi: northwestern Argentina's Jujuy and Salta provinces The glossy-black thrush primarily inhabits the interior of a variety of landscapes in the subtropical and temperate zones, most of which are humid to wet

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The other is found in the northwestern Argentinian provinces of Jujuy, Salta, and Tucumán

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tucumanus is found in northwestern Argentina from Jujuy Province south into Tucumán and Catamarca provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: whitii is found in southern Brazil's Mato Grosso state, southeastern Bolivia, extreme northwestern Paraguay, and northwestern Argentina in Jujuy and Salta provinces and perhaps as far south as Catamarca Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The other is found in northwestern Argentina between southern Jujuy Province and northwestern Catamarca Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: blakei is found from southern Bolivia into northern Argentina's Jujuy and Salta provinces. The speckled nightingale-thrush primarily inhabits humid tropical and subtropical forest where it favors the undergrowth in damp ravines and areas along forest streams. In elevation it ranges between in Venezuela, between in Colombia, mostly between but lower in the west in Ecuador, and between in the eastern Peruvian Andes and at about in Tumbes.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A third is found from La Paz Department in northern Bolivia south into Jujuy and Salta provinces in northwestern Argentina. The tawny tit-spinetail primarily inhabits Polylepis woodland but also occurs in montane scrublands and some grasslands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cinereiventris is found in the Argentinian provinces of Jujuy and Salta

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Zimmer's tapaculo is found in southern Bolivia's Chuquisaca and Tarija departments and Argentina's Jujuy and Salta provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Puna teal is a non-migratory bird native to the Neotropical realm of South America. Its range is confined to the Puna zone of the Andes Mountains, extending from central Peru (around the Junín region) southward through western Bolivia, northern Chile (as far south as Antofagasta), and into the extreme northwest of Argentina (Jujuy Province). This species is restricted to high-altitude environments, typically found at elevations up to 4,600 m (15,100 ft).{{Cite book |last1=del Hoyo |first1=Josep |last2=Collar |first2=Nigel |last3=Kirwan |first3=Guy M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The main population occurs in the Pantanal of Brazil (south-western Mato Grosso, western Mato Grosso do Sul and southern Rondônia), northern Argentina (eastern Jujuy and northern Salta), far northern Paraguay (Alto Paraguay and Concepción) and most of northern and eastern Bolivia (Beni, Santa Cruz, Chuquisaca and Tarija)
